programme.desc: A large mountain containing the precious mineral Energon is discovered.

programme.title: Olly's Quest For Fame
programme.desc: Paisley turns to Zac for help with something completely unrelated: dancing. She hopes that learning a new skill will help her feel more grounded and in control.

programme.title: Can Of Worms
programme.desc: Lloyd moves in and tries to make nice by helping out with chores, but he just gets in the way. Pythor has awoken the Vipoids and the Constrictaurs and an all out snake war has taken over Ninjago. The Ninja are not faring well, when a mysterious Samurai shows up and saves the day.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes Guardians of the Galaxy: The Thanos Threat
programme.desc: The Guardians of the Galaxy protect the Build Stone. When Thanos, Ronan, Nebula and the Ravagers seek to possess the Build Stone, the fate of the universe depends on the Guardians of the Galaxy to protect it.

programme.title: Fright Knight
programme.desc: Using the Book of Fear, Jestro calls forth Whipperella and uses her to trap the knights in the dark woods where they realize their darkest fears. Searching through the dark forests of the realm, Jestro finds “The Book of Fear.” It's pretty scary. But he feeds it to the book of Book of Monsters, and he uses it to call forth WHIPPERELLA, a monster that can induce fear. One-by-one she uses her “knighmarish” power on the knights and they experiences their own worst fears. Clay fears not living up to the Knights' Code. Lance fears being a nobody. Macy fears never being a knight and Axl fears having no food. Aaron must take the lead because he's fearless he does everything with reckless abandon. It's not until he leads the group out of the forest – as they fight off the Whipperella – that they we find out Aaron's true fear – the fear of peace and quiet and no more challenges or high energy escapades.

programme.title: Market Day
programme.desc: Each month there is a big market at the Speedor races. Laval and Eris go there, but Cragger has hired the Ravens to steal Laval's precious Speedor. And suddenly the prize of the races, the Golden CHI, has also disappeared.

programme.title: The Power and the Peril!
programme.desc: Rock star mathematician Ian Malcolm returns to Isla Nublar and helps Claire, Owen and Hudson deal with strange power surges all over Jurassic World.

programme.title: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: Laval and Li'Ella's relationship grows as he gives her a tour of the Lion City. But distracted, he misses a key battle against the Hunters. Tormak joins the fight and saves the day. But the Lion King Lagravis is captured and brought to the Ice Fort. Who will lead the Lions now?!?

programme.title: Secret Crush
programme.desc: Aliya and Liann take matters into their own hands as they go undercover to solve the mystery of Ley-La, the secretive and enigmatic figure who's been lurking around the periphery of their lives. Posing as reporters, they dig deep and discover a key clue.

programme.title: Tick Tock
programme.desc: When the four ninja follow the mysterious falcon into the woods, they stumble on a hidden work shop where Zane learns the secret about his past and in the process, finally knowing who he is, he is the first ninja to unlock his true potential.

programme.title: Marvel Black Panther Trouble in Wakanda
programme.desc: Being the King of Wakanda is tough -- especially when you're also the Black Panther! When Thanos arrives from outer space and threatens to destroy Earth, the Black Panther leaps into action and defeats him with the help of Earth's Mightiest Heroes. But the situation only gets worse when rogue villains Killmonger and Klaue team up with the Mad Titan to take the fight to Black Panther's homeland! Can the Panther pounce on their perilous plan before Wakanda is pulverized?

programme.title: The Maze Of Amazement
programme.desc: The Knights find themselves trapped in a maze looking for the Book of Deception. But will they actually get their hands on it, or will it keep deceiving them? The Knights travel to the Hill Country in the northern part of Knighton to Axl's home town of DIGGINGTON (where they realize that all of Axl's family look just like him.) While they're there, Merlok 2.0 detects something…one of the Magic Books! It's “The Book of Deception.” They go to find it and discover it ended up under a mountain. And, to make matters worse, the magic book has built a maze around itself to keep it from being found (it is deceptive!) As the NEXO-Knights enter the maze from one side, Jestro enters from the other the Book of Monsters has led him to the maze to get The Book of Deception, too. It's a race through this confusing maze to see who can get the book first. Ava figures out the maze is the Whackman maze from a videogame. After help from Axl's people to defeat Jestro and win the book, the knights discover it's a FAKE BOOK of deception. The Book of Deception created a fake copy of itself!

programme.title: The Hundred Year Moon
programme.desc: At the night of the Hundred Year Moon, the Wolves are running wild and causing havoc. Crooler kidnaps a young gorilla girl to lure Laval, Eris and Gorzan the Gorilla out to rescue her. It is a very dangerous night, but finally Skinnet the Skunk's foul odor may prove useful.

programme.title: Fish Story!
programme.desc: Vic and Owen find themselves, along with Sinjin, in the middle of a massive dino-fight in the old Jurassic Park Visitor Center.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet
programme.desc: Philippe Cousteau Jr. is no stranger to exploration. The grandson of legendary underwater explorer Jacques Cousteau, Philippe hosts and serves as executive producer of this half-hour earth science series that examines the planet. He visits diamond and gold mines to see how gems and metals are formed, travels to active volcanoes to observe what happens inside the Earth's burning core, and checks out weather stations in mountainous areas to get an idea of how weather phenomena form in the atmosphere.

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: Caso cerrado
programme.desc: El hijastro de Enrique, de 10 años, le roba la tarjeta y gasta 50 mil dólares en un casino online. A Galilea la sacan de un grupo de asexuales, por un video que muestra su operación de vagina.

programme.title: Minuto para ganar
programme.desc: Diez desafíos, un gran premio y sólo una hora para poder obtenerlo son los ingredientes de este divertido concurso conducido por Marco Antonio Regil. Cada noche los concursantes deberán completar disparatados retos en menos de 60 segundos para evitar ser eliminados. Los elementos de uso cotidiano del hogar se convierten en divertidos juegos en donde las alfombras de baño sirven como trineos, los lápices se vuelven complicados aparatos de ingeniería y las latas de refresco son obstáculos de equilibrio. Al final, tendrán que completar el reto de "La moneda millonaria y en menos de 60 segundos deben hacer que una moneda aterrice dentro de un jarro de agua localizado a 4 metros de distancia. Un ingenioso programa de concursos que mantendrá a los televidentes al filo de sus sillas.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta busca a Reverte para pedirle que juntos aprendan a tratarse como padre e hija. Santos le dice a Mia que la forma de demostrar amor es perdonando. Mia le pide a Rocco que persiga y grabe a su papá, porque quiere saber quién es su novia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma lleva reporteros al Elite y así obliga a León a no expulsar a ningún alumno y Reverte regresa al colegio Diego le advierte a Javier que lo desenmascarará frente a Roberta Mia discute con Franco por negarse a retirarle su apoyo a Miguel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Franco quiere confesarle a Mia que anda con Alma, pero ella no quiere que Roberta se entere. Franco le ofrece trabajo a Miguel. Alma, celosa de Reverte, le dice a Roberta que si quiere se vaya con él. Javier golpea a Diego y lo deja inconsciente.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta le dice a León que Diego se cayó sólo Javier le confiesa a Reverte que fue él quien le pegó a Diego Sol se enfurece al descubrir que su plan para separar a Tomás y Pilar falló José recibe un correo informándole que su tutor murió.

programme.title: Esmeralda: Posibilidades
programme.desc: Esmeralda lleva a su bebé al hospital, pues estuvo con fiebre y Álvaro llega preguntando por su hijo, frase que hiere en el orgullo a José Armando.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Camila sigue desaparecida y, junto con otras mujeres, es prisionera de un grupo de piratas. Vasco y Úrsula tienen un encuentro romántico. Camila se hace amiga de Jimena.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana: Conociendo a su familia
programme.desc: Ramiro le cuenta a Mariano que Ana Lucía es amante de Marcelo y que Ana Leticia sabe todo. Orlando le dice a Evaristo que no quiere terminar en la cárcel por la muerte de Daniel y Maribel escucha todo. Mariano se presenta con Ana Lucía como su tío.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Malas intenciones
programme.desc: Juan y sus hermanos encuentran el testamento de sus padres. Gabriela le deja en claro a Sofía que su amor por Fernando es lo más importante.

programme.title: Amores con trampa: Oferta de negocio
programme.desc: Carmen le pregunta a Felipe si está interesado en Hilda. Facundo le pide a Santiago que le venda las acciones que le quedan de la compañía. Porfirio le confiesa a Conchita que siempre ha tenido la esperanza de volverse a encontrar con su esposa.

programme.title: Qué bonito amor: Compromiso
programme.desc: Coloso le pide a Elvira que se alíen para vengarse de Santos. María recibe una sorpresa por parte de Santos y él le entrega el anillo de compromiso que le dio su madre.

programme.title: Pasión y poder: Perder lo más amado
programme.desc: Erick le dice al juez que Consuelo es amante de Miguel, el hombre que trató de matarlo. Un hombre roba al bebé de Consuelo.

programme.title: Mañana es para siempre: Sin máscaras
programme.desc: Gardenia sufre al ver a Eduardo besarse con Erika. Fernanda lleva a cabo sus planes para demostrar que Flor no es una estafadora. Jaime le asegura a Fernanda que Flor fue su novia. Steve le pide a Eduardo que no se case con Erika.

programme.title: Las mulas del pueblo
programme.desc: Cuando un presidente municipal de un pueblo pequeño quiere vender una mula, empiezan los problemas porque la gente confunde el apodo de la mula con el de su hija.

programme.title: Johnny Chicano
programme.desc: Un joven campesino se enamora de la hija del patrón americano, trayendo problemas para su novia chicana y su familia.

programme.title: Los valientes de Guerrero
programme.desc: En un pueblo lleno de odio, donde las peleas con machetes están a la orden del día, un comisario trata de cambiar las costumbres violentas y traer paz.

programme.title: Gavilán o paloma
programme.desc: José José muestra la realidad de la vida de una estrella y cómo la fama, el dinero, y los placeres pueden destruirlo.

programme.title: Johnny Chicano
programme.desc: Un joven campesino se enamora de la hija del patrón americano, trayendo problemas para su novia chicana y su familia.

programme.title: Flor Silvestre
programme.desc: José Luis, hijo de un hacendado, decide ir en contra de su familia casándose con Esperanza, una campesina humilde. Su padre lo echa de la casa para oponerse a la boda y porque se enteró que es parte de la Revolución Mexicana. Unos falsos revolucionarios, invaden la hacienda y asesinan al padre de José Luis, y así comienza una cadena de venganzas y tragedias.

programme.title: El sol sale para todos
programme.desc: Un novillero sufre un accidente durante una tarde de corrida en una plaza pueblerina, y su examante cuenta su historia.

programme.desc: La esposa de un ingeniero petrolero se preocupa de la posibilidad de que su hijo puede haber heredado su demencia.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.desc: Jorge y Nico quieren ser populares y forman una banda. Pero Diego, un chico cuyo padre está enfermo, les enseña el sentido real de la música.

programme.sub-title: Mientras más profundo es el río, menos ruido hace

programme.sub-title: A buen sueño no hay cama dura
programme.desc: Sandra es apasionada del fútbol, pero su mamá quiere que se dedique al modelaje. Sandra demuestra que es capaz de cumplir su sueño.

programme.desc: A Toño nada le importa. Su novia secuestra a Rodrigo, el hermano de Toño. Cuando las circunstancias parecen sombrías, Toño mostrará su verdadero valor.

programme.sub-title: Para mal de amores, no hay doctores

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Es noche de eliminación y uno de los escuadrones deja la competencia. Los pequeños cumplen el reto de canto de Miguel Bosé con sorprendentes resultados. Los capitanes se enfrentan al reto del "Botonera".

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.sub-title: A un paso de la final

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Aquí y ahora

programme.title: EXO 'REVERXE' Trailer
programme.desc: EXO has returned with a new trailer. At the end of the trailer, the title of EXO's 8th full-length album, “REVERXE,” was finally revealed. Based on EXO's universe storyline — “the day we truly become one, a new world will open” — the album name reinterprets the word “Reverse” in EXO's own style, carrying the meaning “a new world opens once again,” further heightening anticipation.

programme.title: DOYOUNG 'Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)' Live Clip
programme.desc: Layered over a jazz guitar melody, the sweet vocals blend together like a conversation, conveying a lovely sense of fluttering excitement. The track “Whistle (Feat. BELLE of KISS OF LIFE)” is an R&B ballad that depicts a moment of exchanging feelings through the sound of a whistle. With Belle participating as a featuring artist and harmonizing with DOYOUNG, the synergy between the two elevates the charm of the song even further.

programme.title: JUNGWOO 'SUGAR' MV
programme.desc: NCT JUNGWOO's first solo single “SUGAR” is a groovy pop song with swing‑infused drums, a witty bassline, and a smooth, catchy melody. The lyrics send a warm message of gratitude to fans, wishing that past memories and future moments are all sweet. The music video brings this sweetness to life with colorful, sugar-inspired visuals, while the performance highlights JUNGWOO's stylish movements and precise choreography, showcasing his unique stage presence.

programme.title: WayV '白色定格 (Eternal White)' MV
programme.desc: The title track “白色定格 (Eternal White)” is a dance-pop song that blends a rhythmic saxophone riff with energetic drum beats, creating a warm atmosphere through the harmony of powerful rap and sweet vocals. The lyrics express a strong determination to break free from time frozen like a white winter and to keep moving forward, capturing the hearts of listeners..

programme.title: Count Basie
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1979, legendary big band leader and pianist Count Basie brought his famous big band to the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague to perform two sets. Basie, whose minimalist pianism and blues-oriented swing style had cemented his popularity as early as the 1930s, was in the midst of a European tour and had recorded his live album 'On the Road' the previous night in Montreux, Switzerland. Here is the second of two sets recorded at the festival in 1979.

programme.title: Manu Dibango, Daniel Rallo, Jerry Malekani & Frederic Gaillardet
programme.sub-title: Soul Makossa: Manu Dibango in Stuttgart
programme.desc: Manu Dibango, one of Africa's biggest musical stars and top saxophonists, is an indispensable artist. He was one of the first African musicians to score a worldwide hit with his 1972 release “Soul Makossa”, paving the way for many other artists. The very concept of world music owes much to him. A superb stage performer with great communicative humour, Dibango is above all one of the founding fathers of a modern African musical style that is open to jazz, R&B, salsa, gospel, funk, and reggae. This concert showcases all these genres, and features an excellent line-up of musicians from the four corners of the planet.

programme.title: Seun Kuti
programme.desc: Seun Anikulapo Kuti possesses the grace, energy and fury of his father, the legendary artist Fela Kuti. With the musicians of Fela Kuti's legendary band Egypt 80, Seaun Kuti brings the most original incarnation of Afrobeat to life. Digging deep into different African traditions, Seun has brought his own touch to the music by reflecting the difficulties and cultures of the continent. Three-quarters of Egypt 80's current line-up is composed of musicians who didn't only play with Fela Kuti, but often were arrested and harassed alongside the founder of the Afrobeat.

programme.title: Paul Desmond
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: James Brown
programme.sub-title: James Brown - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. Back in 1981, legendary American singer James Brown gave an unforgettable performance at the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. The "Godfather of Soul", "Mr. Dynamite", and "Soul Brother No. 1" was a major force in 20th century popular music, influencing many musicians in numerous genres.

programme.title: John Coltrane, McCoy Tyner, Elvin Jones & Jimmy Garrison
programme.desc: The mere mention of the name John Coltrane evokes a deeply emotional, often spiritual response from even the most casual jazz fan. Dexter Gordon was a fantastic saxophonist. Miles Davis was a genius. Coltrane stood above - he was a visionary, a saint-like figure. By the standards of most jazz musicians, his life was uneventful. Sure, he had a heroin habit for a while, and Miles Davis punched him, but once he'd experienced the “spiritual awakening” described in the liner notes of his 1965 album A Love Supreme, he dedicated himself to his music with extreme single-mindedness. This broadcast of Coltrane's 1965 performance at the short-lived Belgian jazz festival in Comblain-la-Tour features Trane's classic quartet with Elvin Jones (drums), Jimmy Garrison (bass) and McCoy Tyner (piano).

programme.title: Sir Simon Rattle & London Symphony Orchestra
programme.sub-title: The LSO performs Dvořák and Tchaikovsky
programme.desc: Sir Simon Rattle conducts the London Symphony Orchestra (LSO) in a concert program consisting of Antonín Dvořák's Scherzo Capriccioso in D-flat major, Op. 66, and selections from Act II of Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky's famous ballet The Nutcracker (1892). Dvořák's Scherzo Capriccioso (1883) reflects a period of personal crisis for the composer. The work betrays ever-changing moods and a constant sense of inner restlessness. In the music of The Nutcracker, Tchaikovsky combined memorable melodies with colorful orchestration, which has enchanted listeners for decades. This performance was recorded at LSO St Luke's in London, UK, on March 18, 2021.

programme.title: Roberto Abbado, Filarmonica Arturo Toscanini, Coro del Teatro Regio di Parma & Eleonora Buratto
programme.desc: Roberto Abbado conducts the Filarmonica Arturo Toscanini, the Coro del Teatro Regio di Parma, and four vocal soloists in an outstanding performance of Giuseppe Verdi's Messa da Requiem, recorded at the Parco Ducale di Parma, Italy as part of Festival Verdi 2020. The soloists are soprano Eleonora Buratto, mezzosoprano Anita Rachvelishvili, tenor Giorgio Berrugi, and bass Roberto Tagliavini. When his fellow composer Gioachino Rossini died in 1868, Verdi proposed to compose a ‘Messa per Rossini' in his honor, to be written by himself and several other Italian composers. Verdi wrote the concluding movement, ‘Libera me'. When the premiere was cancelled, the project lay dormant. When Italian poet Alessandro Manzoni passed away a few years later, Verdi revisited his plan to compose a requiem – this time in honor of the poet he so greatly admired. As an opera composer, Verdi knew better than anyone how to infuse the work with drama, as is evident in the revised version of his ‘Libera me'. The famous, powerful ‘Dies Irae' especially stands out, depicting the horrors of the Last Judgement.

programme.title: Isabelle Faust
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Leonard Slatkin, Leonard Slatkin, Orchestre National de Lyon & Baiba Skride
programme.desc: Leonard Slatkin conducts the Orchestre national de Lyon in a concert recorded at the Auditorium de Lyon in France, 2013. The concert is a tribute to the organ of the Maurice-Ravel Auditorium, which was made by Aristide Cavaillé-Coll. The program features three works which premiered on exactly the same organ: Camille Saint-Saëns' Cyprès et Lauriers and Symphony No. 3 and Poulenc's Concerto for Organ, Timpani and Strings. Soloist is Vincent Warnier.

programme.title: Julijana Sarac
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Raphael Pichon, Ensemble Pygmalion, Sabine Devieilhe & Arnaud de Pasquale
programme.sub-title: Mozart - A Gala for the Weber Sisters
programme.desc: On March 23, 1783, Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart gave a successful concert at Vienna's Burgtheater that he dedicated to two sopranos: Aloysia and Josepha Weber, the sisters of his wife Constanze. The concert's program would be considered odd by today's standards. The composer's Symphony No. 35 was broken up and interspersed with other compositions, such as concertos, arias, and works for solo piano. Nearly two and a half centuries later, French soprano Sabine Devieilhe, conductor Raphaël Pichon and his Ensemble Pygmalion bring a wonderful concert inspired by that remarkable event. The program includes: ‘Allegro con spirito' of Symphony No. 35, also known as the Haffner Symphony ‘Vorrei spiegarvi, oh Dio', KV 418 ‘Schon lacht der holde Frühling', KV 580 Trio of ‘Die Schlittenfahrt' No. 3, KV 605 Deutscher Tanz No. 6, KV 571 ‘Der Hölle Rache kocht in meinem Herzen' from Mozart's opera Die Zauberflöte ‘Finale: Presto' of Symphony No. 35 ‘Nehmt meinen Dank', KV 383 and ‘Dans un bois solitaire et sombre', KV 308. This performance was recorded at Théâtre Impérial de Compiègne, in Compiègne, France.

programme.title: Les Dissonances & David Grimal
programme.sub-title: Schubert - String Quartet No. 15 in G major
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances' string quartet – consisting of David Grimal (violin), Hans Peter Hofmann (violin), David Gaillard (viola), and Xavier Phillips (cello) – performs Franz Schubert's String Quartet No. 15 in G major, D. 887, Op. 161. Schubert composed this work, his final string quartet, in a mere ten days in June 1826. However, this highly original piece, characterized by its restless shifts between major and minor, was not published until after Schubert's death in 1851. This performance was recorded at Cité de la Musique in Paris, France, in 2014.

programme.desc: David Gilmour - Remember That Night: Live at the Royal Albert Hall is recorded by guitarist David Gilmour where he presents live tracks from the album On an Island and some hits from his former band Pink Floyd.

programme.title: Duane Allman
programme.desc: Duane Allman, the lead guitarist and driving force behind Southern Rock pioneers The Allman Brothers Band, lived a tragically short life, but during his brief career he changed music forever. With contributions from an illustrious and highly knowledgeable cast of friends, insiders and experts, plus rare footage and exclusive interviews, this film looks at Duane's life, work and musical output.

programme.title: Ocean Vibes

programme.title: Ocean Vibes

programme.title: Ocean Vibes
programme.desc: Bejeweled Fishes captures the spectacular beauty of fishes inhabiting the coral reefs of the Tropical Pacific.

programme.title: Ocean Vibes
programme.desc: Whales features the ocean's most majestic creatures. This Wild Window contains spectacular images of humpback whales, sperm whales, and blue whales.

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands
programme.desc: In their first collaboration, cinematographer Stefan Zimmerman and Nature Relaxation™ producer David Huting present "Above the Spanish Islands." This 50-minute 4K aerial film captures Mallorca and the Canary Islands, set to ambient music by Diamans, Electus, and Michael St. Laurent.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland II
programme.desc: Summertime in Iceland from an elevated perspective with "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle."

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: A Day in Big Sur 1
programme.desc: Transport your senses to the rugged yet exquisitely beautiful Big Sur coast of California to relax & absorb the healing sights and sounds of McWay Falls from a unique and rare perspective. Filmed more than a decade ago and remastered for maximum color and quality, "A Day in Big Sur" showcases the timeless beauty of this magical destination and attempts to truly capture the spirit of this natural paradise through the use of 50+ artistically framed video perspectives - all featuring real stereo nature sounds for an immersive relaxation experience.

programme.title: Northland Beaches: New Zealand
programme.desc: Tag along with us while we traverse the Northland region's pristine beaches that showcase the diverse natural beauty of New Zealand's coastline. Bask in the unspoiled scenery of sandy shores, clear waters, and stunning natural landscapes.

programme.title: Purple Mountain Wildflowers
programme.desc: Purple Mountain Wildflowers offers a full 1-hour immersion into a field of purple lupine flowers in full bloom on a perfect sunny day with bits of clouds and rain appearing - with nature sounds.

programme.title: Railey Peninsula
programme.desc: Explore the stunning Thailand islands of the Railey Peninsula for one full hour of ambient relaxation. Viewers will enjoy exotic beaches, and islands that appear as if they came bursting out of the sea. Paired with ocean sounds for total relaxation.

programme.title: Muriwai Beach: New Zealand

programme.title: ART Buzz
programme.desc: A vibrant collection celebrating the creativity of Asian Pacific Islander Desi American artists. Blending ancestral influences with modern expression, each piece captures the dynamic intersection of tradition, identity, and the evolving artistic landscape.

programme.title: ART Buzz
programme.desc: A powerful art collection capturing the vibrant essence of queer identities, experiences, and perspectives within the LGBTQ+ community. Bouncing basslines, punchy drum kits, and house-driven melodies add to the atmosphere of freedom and joy.

programme.title: ART In Season
programme.desc: Celebrate the dawn of a sparkling New Year with elegant strokes of white, silver, and gold. The artwork create a harmonious symphony of sophistication and hope, radiating a sense of renewal and opulence.

programme.title: ART In Season
programme.desc: Experience an electric celebration under glowing lights. This art collection pulses with fluorescent energy and vibrant color, capturing the intense joy of fresh starts and the radiant anticipation of the year ahead.

programme.title: ART In Season
programme.desc: Experience a glittering celebration of the New Year. Capturing the spirit of fresh beginnings with sparkling portrayals of hope & renewal and bursting with festive energy & the joyful anticipation of what lies ahead.

programme.title: ART After Dark
programme.desc: A thought-provoking collection of artwork that invites self-exploration and reflection. Through poignant and emotive depictions of the human experience, these pieces inspire deep contemplation of life's complexities, emotions, and personal journeys.

programme.title: ART After Dark
programme.desc: A mesmerizing late night art palette and mood-setting experience that invites you to indulge your senses and explore the ethereal realm of nocturnal beauty. The accompanying playlist sounds a lot like a loft party after midnight: dark and dreamy.

programme.title: DreamLOUPE: Surreal Psychedelic—Part 1
